mapper.select: SELECT vd.*, u.name as university_name, m.name as major_name, uv.score as student_score, uv.rank as student_rank, ap.min_score, ap.min_rank, CASE WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score THEN 'admitted' WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score - 20 THEN 'waiting' ELSE 'rejected' END as simulation_status, (uv.score - ap.min_score) as score_diff FROM volunteer_detail vd JOIN user_volunteer uv ON vd.volunteer_id = uv.id JOIN university u ON vd.university_id = u.id JOIN major m ON vd.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN admission_plan ap ON ap.major_id = m.id AND ap.university_id = u.id AND ap.year = uv.year WHERE uv.user_id = #{userId} AND uv.id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY vd.priority

SELECT ROUND( CASE WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score THEN 0.95 WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score - 10 THEN 0.75 WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score - 20 THEN 0.50 WHEN uv.score >= ap.min_score - 30 THEN 0.25 ELSE 0.10 END, 2 ) as probability FROM volunteer_detail vd JOIN user_volunteer uv ON vd.volunteer_id = uv.id LEFT JOIN admission_plan ap ON ap.major_id = vd.major_id AND ap.university_id = vd.university_id AND ap.year = uv.year WHERE vd.id = #{volunteerDetailId}

update.foreach: UPDATE admission_simulation SET simulation_status = #{item.simulationStatus}, predicted_probability = #{item.predictedProbability}, score_diff = #{item.scoreDiff}, admitted_time = #{item.admittedTime} WHERE volunteer_detail_id = #{item.volunteerDetailId}
